pkgmetadata.longdescription: A Python package to read and write SAS(sas7bdat, sas7bcat, xportxpt), SPSS (sav, zsav, por) and Stata (dta) files intofrom pandas data frames. It is a wrapperaround the C library readstat.brPlease visit out project home page for more informationbrhttpsgithub.comRochepyreadstat
